title: Remove references to kube being development
body:
At this point and even though we are always improving the play and
generate kube functions, I would say it no longers needs to be denoted
as under development.

[NO TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Do we still generate that comment in new YAML?
